name: Scallop Stir-Fry (30mins) Menu #13
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Asparagus, cut into 1 inch pieces
1 Red pepper, sliced into thin rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in lightly salted boiling water according to package instructions.
2. Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
3. Add asparagus, red pepper, onions, and garlic. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
4. Add scallops; stir-fry until scallops turn opaque.
5. Stir in soy sauce, hot pepper sauce, sesame oil, and juice of half a lime.
6. Add noodles; heat thoroughly, stirring occasionally.
7. VARIATION: Use vermicelli instead of ramen noodles.
